mapper.sql: A.NCRD_ID AS ncrdId, A.NM AS ncrdNm, A.NCRD_TRGTER_ID AS ncrdTrgterId, A.OTHBC_AT AS othbcAt, A.EXTRL_USER_AT AS extrlUserAt, A.CMPNY_NM AS cmpnyNm, A.DEPT_NM AS deptNm, A.OFCPS_NM AS ofcpsNm, A.IDNTFC_NO AS idntfcNo, A.MIDDLE_MBTLNUM AS middleMbtlNum, A.END_MBTLNUM AS endMbtlNum, A.EMAIL_ADRES AS emailAdres, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId, TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm

sql.if: AND (A.NM LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchWrd}),'%') OR A.CMPNY_NM LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchWrd}),'%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT FROM TB_NCRD A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.NM LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_NCRD A WHERE 1=1
SELECT FROM TB_NCRD A WHERE A.NCRD_TRGTER_ID = #{ncrdTrgterId} ORDER BY A.NM LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_NCRD A WHERE A.NCRD_TRGTER_ID = #{ncrdTrgterId}
SELECT FROM TB_NCRD A WHERE A.NCRD_ID = #{ncrdId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_NCRD (NCRD_ID, NM, NCRD_TRGTER_ID, OTHBC_AT, EXTRL_USER_AT, CMPNY_NM, DEPT_NM, OFCPS_NM, IDNTFC_NO, MIDDLE_MBTLNUM, END_MBTLNUM, EMAIL_ADRES, FRST_REGISTER_ID, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM) VALUES (#{ncrdId}, #{ncrdNm}, #{ncrdTrgterId}, #{othbcAt}, #{extrlUserAt}, #{cmpnyNm}, #{deptNm}, #{ofcpsNm}, #{idntfcNo}, #{middleMbtlNum}, #{endMbtlNum}, #{emailAdres}, #{frstRegisterId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_NCRD SET NM = #{ncrdNm}, CMPNY_NM = #{cmpnyNm}, DEPT_NM = #{deptNm}, OFCPS_NM = #{ofcpsNm}, MIDDLE_MBTLNUM = #{middleMbtlNum}, END_MBTLNUM = #{endMbtlNum}, EMAIL_ADRES = #{emailAdres}, OTHBC_AT = #{othbcAt}, LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{lastUpdusrId}, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE NCRD_ID = #{ncrdId}
mapper.insert: UPDATE TB_NCRD SET LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE 1=0
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_NCRD SET LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE 1=0
